name: Buttermilk Chive Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chilled butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Stir with a fork until well blended.
3. Add the chilled butter and mix with your fingers or a pastry blender until the mixture resembles irregular crumbs.
4. Gradually add the buttermilk and chives, mixing only until the dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Form the dough into a ball and turn onto a lightly floured surface. Knead lightly about 12 times.
6. Pat the dough into a circle that is about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Use a 2-inch cookie cutter to cut rounds and place them on a baking sheet.
7. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until the tops are lightly browned. Serve warm.
Yield: 15 biscuits
